summary.zh: 道具 / 图标工作台(规划中)。目标是在 Studio 内编辑一款游戏的 items.json 与像素 icon,并接上 2D 侧滚 / 可平铺 / AI 像素的生图链路,做到道具数据与图标素材一处管理、所见即所得。当前为 marketplace 占位:插件清单与入口已就位,真正的 React 面板实现安排在后续 sprint,届时替换占位 shim。
summary.en: Items & icons workbench (planned). The goal is to edit a game's items.json and pixel icons inside Studio and wire up 2D side-scroller / tileable / AI-pixel generation pipelines, managing item data and icon assets in one place, WYSIWYG. It is currently a marketplace placeholder: the manifest and entry are in place, with the real React panel scheduled for a later sprint to replace the shim.

body.zh:
编辑 items.json + 像素 icon
接 2D 像素生图链路
body.en:
Edit items.json + pixel icons
Hook up 2D pixel-gen pipelines

body.zh: marketplace 占位,面板实现待后续 sprint
body.en: Marketplace placeholder; panel lands in a later sprint
